positive: Minimalist graphic design, featuring a stylized celestial map composition. The central subject is a crescent moon and a cluster of abstract nebula swirls, rendered in deep indigo, electric sapphire, and muted golds. The stars are sharp, geometric constellations connected by fine, glowing lines. The overall aesthetic is clean and sophisticated, resembling etched linocut mixed with modern digital glow. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, with perfect negative space around the elements. Use high contrast black outlines on a solid, clean white background, suitable for printing on apparel. Flat vector illustration style with subtle gradient shading.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, messy, low resolution, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy edges, gradient background, photo, realistic photography
